display_text: Chipped Vest, Tier 1: Neutral item with Chipper passive (returns 30 damage to heroes and 20 damage to creeps each time you are attacked). A defensive item that punishes attackers, effective for tanky frontliners who take many hits. Stats: Tier: 1, Hero Return: 30, Creep Return: 20.
